feed.title: SAP Community - SAP NetWeaver
feed.subtitle: SAP NetWeaver Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Issue in Execute KSCB
entry.content:
Hi There Expertise,

Need help for this issue, Im trying to upload a plan hour for January 2024, when I excute with T-code KSCB, there an error message " Cycle xxxxxx is not valid for complete period"

plis, kindly for your advice

Thank's

Valen

entry.title: Date format issue in fiori app
entry.content:
While testing facing date issue from frontend of Fiori App, after post format changes (ddmm->mmdd) and i.e, happening only for frontend users. In gateway client works, if login from diff id still same.

We checked the settings in 2 s/m and consulted team members, basis/ security to assing roles. still couldnt find RC n to resolve.

entry.title: SAP Netweaver Java System OS/DB migration from Oracle 19c to HANA DB 2.0
entry.content:
Dear Community,

Happy New Year.

I have a question with regards to SAP OS/DB migration. What SAP Notes should the application team responsible for customization on an SAP Netweaver Java System take into account during an OS/DB migration from Oracle 19c database to HANA 2.0 database for a proper 1:1 functionality ?

Please kindly provide the necessary SAP Notes below.

Thanks in advance.

Cheers

entry.title: I have a problem when logging in to the portal, this message appears: User authentication failed in
FPM Save Search for special users
entry.content:
Hello,

is it possible to save an FPM OVP Search for special users?

Currently i can only save a search personal or global.

Thank you

entry.title: SEGW Get method : Issue Error Message
entry.content:
Hi,

I want to issue a message like 'Sales Order not found' in a simple way rather than raising an exception using /IWBEP/IF_MESSAGE_CONTAINER  or  /IWBEP/CX_BUSI_EXCEPTION classes.

Only i want that one line message has to appear in the response section.

entry.title: Request for Access to Retrieve KBA BY SAP Gateway Integration
entry.content:
Want to retrieve SAP KBA Files by Microsoft Power Platform(automate).

I've successfully integrated a demo account with SAP Gateway Demo system ,I can retrieve Products and GWSAMPLE_BASIC. and I'm now interested in programmatically accessing Knowledge-Based Articles (KBAs) related to SAP Gateway. Is there an API or a specific method. 

I can use to automate the retrieval of KBA files?.

Your guidance on this matter would be highly valuable.

entry.title: Customer Statement with combined accounts
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am looking for solution to generate single correspondence (Transaction F.27) for multiple accounts within same company code. Reason being these accounts are belongs to one main account, the requirement is to generate one customer statement for main account containing all line items from the associated accounts.

Could anyone please suggest if this is feasible without the need of going through customized print program?

Many thanks.

entry.title: Unable to replace(import) a certificate(.pfx file) in SAP PI NWA via PKCS#12 Key Pair menu
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are trying to replace the certificate that got expired in our non-production environment for an urgent testing of a critical change and doing the import (.pfx file) through “Import Entry” option in SAP PI NWA.

Path: NWA -> Configuration -> Certificates and Keys -> Key Storage
Key Storage View: TrustedCAs

And then follow the way as below:

View Entries -> Import Entry
Select entry type: PKCS#12 Key Pair

We have a .pfx file and a password available to enter and do the import thereafter.

Once we do the import, we are getting below error:

ERROR:  -> ID21108: [Liaik.asn1.ASN1Object; (loaded by com.sap.engine.boot.loader.ResourceMultiParentClassLoader@0x00000007f0069ed8) cannot be cast to [B

Note: None of our other non-production systems were able to import the certificate. We tried to revert the kernel version from 1200 to 1117 (as recommended in the post Solved: Import P12 keypair in java instance fails - SAP Community), but still, it didn't work.

Any help to resolve this issue would be highly appreciated (since the interface is very critical which is related to bank file) as the production certificate expiry is nearing and needs to be replaced soon (within next 7 days).

Thank you.

entry.title: Syslog entries concerning SSF_KRN_SIGN_BY_AS
entry.content:
How we can avoid entries in SM21 : SSF_KRN_VERIFY_BY_AS : Function return 5. SSF API: Signer error

This entries are from a http connection to our new dokument server.

In TA STRUST the PSE is excisting und in status ok

In TA OAC0 there is a checkbox for check signature. Unfortunately I cannot deactivated to see if  the entries still occoure

entry.title: SAP NetWeaver 7.5 Installation issue with SAP Instance failing to start.
entry.content:
I am getting this error on SAP NetWeaver 7.5 installation.

I am running on an Oracle 7.9 system with Oracle 19c pre-installed and using the $ORACLE_HOME as the one provided by Oracle.

I followed this info on using the ORACLE_HOME path and data files location with custom database option.

What can be causing a SAP instance to fail to startup and what logs do you log for to see what command is used?

Thx.

entry.title: Role Request getting auto reconcile
entry.content:
Hi IDM Gurus,

There is an issue, a user had requested a role last year it got approved but Status was failed, Operation Text was "Not Assigned".
The role request got auto reconciled again same approval flow happened but still not assigned.
Even after approving, the role is not getting assigned and getting reconciled again and again.

Could you please provide assistance to find out the cause of this issue.
Your prompt guidance is highly appreciated.

Thanks & Regards,
Laxmi

entry.title: Active/passive Oracle Database in a Red Hat High Availability Pacemaker Cluster
entry.content:
Dear Support,

in our recently installed SAP Process Orchestration (distributed systems) we want to configure High Availability for instance Oracle Database.

These are the details:

OS: RHEL 8.8 with licenses RHEL for SAP solution

DB: Oracle 19c

SAP Process Orchestration 7.5 SP28 

In particular we want to implement Oracle Database in a Red Hat High Availability Pacemaker Cluster.

Please give your confirmation that we can follow the solution provided by RHEL: Otherwise please provide SAP official KB in order to implement the solution required.

Best regards


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SAP NetWeaver 7.5 SP15 on SAP ASE linux credentials on AWS
entry.content:
SAP NetWeaver 7.5 SP15 on SAP ASE Linux and SAP credentials on AWS. I am unable to login after deployment.

sid-j2e Login:

entry.title: SAP Extended Maintenance
entry.content:
Hello Expert,

My current system version is SAP ERP 6.0 with SAP EHP2 for SAP NetWeaver 7.0. I also have an additional add-on, SAP Access Control 10.1, which has had no support since the end of 2020.

SAP has extended the maintenance for the SAP EHP2 until the end of 2025 (Abab). Do we have the same situation for this add-on?

Thanks in advance,

entry.title: Is any way to disable SQL Server transaction log while importing the TR
entry.content:
As we are trying to import the TR into the system my SQL Server transaction log get full and my system get down
so kindly suggest is any way we are disable my sql log while importing the TR.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Use of Oracle Standby database (Setup using datagurard) for System Refresh
entry.content:
We have a query on system refresh. SAP Production system is PR4 and test system is FU4. SAP version is NW 740 ERP 6. Kernel release is 753. DB release is IP_ADDRESS.

Currently SAP PR4 and FU4 database is hosted in Exadata machine RAC cluster with two active nodes. SAP PR4 has a standby database and replication is happening using Oracle Dataguard. 

DBA can clone and rename the PR4 standby database to FU4 database which then can be used for refresh of the SAP FU4? Because no restore is involved and coning can be done very quickly, this will save about 30 hrs of DB restore time. Please advise if this approach is supported by SAP. 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SAP Portal upgrade from current version SAP NW 7.50, SPS 20 to SAP NW 7.50, SPS 26
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Hope you are doing good !!

We are planing to upgrade the EP portal systems from current version SAP NW 7.50, SPS 20 to SAP NW 7.50, SPS 26 and This will be a Technical SPS Upgrade only.

Kindly help on what is the required activities from portal end (pre and post upgrade).

Thank you so much in advacne !!

Regards,
Prasad

entry.title: SAP GRC NFE NT 2024 001 (CTe 4.00)
entry.content: Poderia nos ajudar a entender quando será lançado alguma SAP Note referente a NT 2024 001 (CTe 4.00)

entry.title: Previous data showing in SAP ui5 screen
entry.content:
1. open a first page with navigation list of 2 line items
  2. Navigate to 2nd page using first line item
  3. Go back and opne 2nd line item
  4. busy dialog open along with first line item's data

when we open second line item, previous data is showing along with busy dialong.

Please help how to clear previous data while current page busy dialouge shows.
